creator: mjoyner@rv1.dynip.com
text:
The dist file source locations in the Makefile for gimp-i18n
	are not correct.

Fix: 

Edit 'Makefile', insert 'old/' after unstable in the distfile path.

MASTER_SITES=   ftp://ftp.gimp.org/pub/gimp/unstable/old/v1.1.13/ \
                ftp://ftp.cs.umn.edu/pub/gimp/gimp/unstable/old/v1.1.13/ \
                http://www.ameth.org/gimp/pub/gimp/unstable/old/v1.1.13/
How-To-Repeat: 
	Run 'make' in /usr/ports/graphics/gimp1-i18n
